decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo by playing the Dreadnought alongside Stifle to prevent its triggered ability from resolving, allowing the player to have a 12/12 creature for only one mana. The deck also includes various cards to help dig for combo pieces, protect the combo, and disrupt the opponent. The strategy involves using efficient counterspells, card draw, and tempo plays to control the game until the combo can be set up for a quick victory.

The core strategy of this deck is to quickly and efficiently combo off using Ill-Gotten Gains alongside cards like Lion's Eye Diamond, Lotus Petal, and Dark Ritual. By using cards like Intuition and Brain Freeze, the deck can quickly mill out opponents while generating infinite mana with Cabal Ritual and Gemstone Mine. The deck also has card draw and filtering with Deep Analysis and Mental Note to ensure consistency. City of Brass and Cephalid Coliseum provide mana fixing while Orim's Chant offers protection. Ray of Revelation serves as a sideboard option for dealing with opposing threats.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures that are able to quickly build up a strong board presence and deal damage efficiently. With cards like Goblin Lackey to cheat out creatures, and Goblin Ringleader to draw additional threats, the deck aims to curve out and overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan. The inclusion of removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Gempalm Incinerator helps to clear the way for the Goblins to attack and secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly playing cheap spells and creatures to overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares and counterspells like Counterspell to control the game. The deck also includes card draw and card filtering to maintain a consistent flow of threats. The creatures in the deck, like Nimble Mongoose and Mystic Enforcer, provide a fast clock to pressure the opponent. Additionally, Winter Orb and Gemstone Mine help disrupt the opponent's mana base and slow down their game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing enchantresses to draw cards and ramp mana through enchantments. It aims to establish a board state where it can generate a large amount of mana and recur key enchantments like Parallax Wave and Opalescence to control the board and win the game. The deck includes cards that provide card advantage and protection, complemented by enchantments that synergize with the enchantress theme. Overall, the deck aims to create a powerful engine that overwhelms the opponent with a combination of card draw, mana acceleration, and powerful enchantment synergies.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a horde of aggressive goblin creatures, utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey to put them into play for free and Goblin Warchief to reduce their costs. With a mix of efficient creatures and removal spells like Sparksmith and Gempalm Incinerator, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan. The deck is able to maintain consistency and resiliency through card draw from Goblin Ringleader and tutoring effects from Goblin Matron, ensuring a steady stream of threats.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures like Savannah Lions and Wild Mongrel to pressure the opponent early in the game. The Madness mechanic is utilized with cards like Basking Rootwalla and Arrogant Wurm to efficiently cast spells from the graveyard. The deck includes disruptive elements like Wasteland and Swords to Plowshares to control the opponent's board. The goal is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a relentless assault of creatures while maintaining card advantage with cards like Call of the Herd and Sylvan Library.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy through hand disruption and removal spells while gradually building up its own board presence. The deck utilizes cards like Duress, Cabal Therapy, and Diabolic Edict to strip away the opponent's resources, while also having access to Pernicious Deed for mass removal. The deck also features resilient creatures like Wall of Blossoms and Treetop Village to apply pressure and maintain control. Overall, The Rock excels at controlling the game and outlasting opponents through attrition.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly fill up your graveyard with key enchantments like Parallax Wave and Decree of Silence, then use Replenish to bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo. Cards like Attunement and Intuition help you find the pieces you need, while cards like Seal of Cleansing and Swords to Plowshares provide some removal and disruption. The deck aims to control the game until it can set up its combo and overwhelm the opponent with a board full of powerful enchantments.

This deck focuses on utilizing enchantments to create a powerful board state and draw engine, while also disrupting the opponent with removal and lockdown effects. By using cards such as Argothian Enchantress, Opalescence, and Enchantress's Presence, the deck can quickly build up a massive amount of card advantage and threaten the opponent with a powerful board presence. The inclusion of cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing provides additional utility and protection, while cards like Parallax Wave and Elephant Grass can help control the battlefield and stall until the combo pieces can come together for a game-winning turn.

The main concept of this deck is to use control elements such as Swords to Plowshares and Armageddon to disrupt the opponent, while utilizing Oath of Druids to cheat big creatures like Terravore into play. The deck also includes land destruction with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to further hinder the opponent's resources. Call of the Herd provides additional creature pressure, while Sylvan Library helps with card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures.

The main concept of this combo-enchantress deck is to utilize enchantress effects like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards whenever you play enchantments. The deck aims to ramp up mana quickly with cards like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, and control the board with cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing. The win condition typically involves generating a massive board presence with Opalescence and finishing off the opponent with powerful enchantments like Worship or Replenish. Additionally, the deck includes cards for card selection like Mirri's Guile and Sylvan Library, and mana acceleration with cards like Exploration.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo while using Stifle and Counterspell to protect it. Using card draw spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Gush, the deck can find the necessary pieces efficiently. Cards like Foil and Daze allow for additional protection, while Peek and Portent provide card selection and manipulation. The deck's mana base is designed to provide the necessary colors while minimizing life loss. Overall, the deck aims to win quickly and disrupt the opponent's strategy with counterspells and stifle effects.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly assemble the Tinker Fling combo to deal a massive amount of damage to the opponent in a single turn. The deck focuses on using Phyrexian Devourer in conjunction with Altar of Dementia to mill cards and create a potentially lethal creature, which can then be sacrificed to deal damage with Fling. The deck utilizes various mana acceleration cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb to quickly set up the combo, while also including defensive cards like Defense Grid to protect the combo from disruption.

The deck focuses on using Phyrexian Dreadnought in combination with Stifle to create a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes control elements such as Counterspell and Gush to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to efficiently draw through the deck with cards like Accumulated Knowledge and Portent to find the necessary pieces for the combo. Additionally, the deck includes utility cards like Opt and Impulse to help set up the combo and maintain card advantage.

The main goal of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By utilizing efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, along with direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. Cards like Fireblast and Ball Lightning provide additional burst damage to finish off the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Barbarian Ring helps to sustain pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.
